info.title: Tenders-SA Developer API
info.description: Public data access for South African tenders, awards, and supplier intelligence.

tags.name: CIPC
tags.description: Companies and Intellectual Property Commission data

tags.name: Documents
tags.description: Tender document metadata and download URLs

get.description: Returns entity counts across all D1 tables, last cron run status, and worker version. No auth required.
Returns all provinces known in the tender database with their tender counts. No auth required.
Returns all tender categories with their tender counts. No auth required.
Returns daily and monthly call counts for the authenticated API key, plus rate limits.
Returns industry benchmarks with sample sizes and median values.
Cursor-based paginated list of tenders. Supports `limit` and `cursor` query params.
Filter tenders by estimated value range.
Top companies by award value or count.
